DP.470.0000:
Your quest for power has brought
you here...\f
...Very well.\f
Let me reward your passion with some
absolutely astounding moves.\f
They’re the ultimate moves!
Shall I teach them to your Pokémon?
DP.470.0001:
The ultimate moves!
Shall I teach them to your Pokémon?
DP.470.0002:
To which Pokémon should I teach
a move?\f
DP.470.0003:
Hmm... Well, that is fine, as well.
Visit if you have a change of heart.
DP.470.0004:
To which Pokémon should I teach
a move?
DP.470.0005:
That Pokémon can’t learn a move!
Read the poster! Keh!
DP.470.0006:
Teach a move to an Egg?
Impossible even for me! Keh!
DP.470.0007:
You’ve not bonded strongly enough
with your Pokémon! Keh!
DP.470.0008:
That Pokémon already knows the move
I’ve offered to teach! Keh!
DP.470.0009:
I should teach Blast Burn to
your [0100,0000]?
DP.470.0010:
I should teach Hydro Cannon to
your [0100,0000]?
DP.470.0011:
I should teach Frenzy Plant to
your [0100,0000]?
DP.470.0013:
[0100,0000] is trying to learn
[0106,0001].\f
But [0100,0000] can’t learn more
than four moves.\f
Delete an older move to make
room for [0106,0001]?
DP.470.0014:
Is it OK to forget the
move [0106,0001]?
DP.470.0018:
